mainEntity.name: How to prove employer negligence in ladder fall comp claim in Farmington?
mainEntity.text: How to prove employer negligence in ladder fall comp claim in Farmington?

acceptedAnswer.text: Show improper setup, no training, or missing safety gear via photos, witnesses, maintenance logs. Shifts burden in disputed claims.

suggestedAnswer.text: Farmington construction: Document 3:1 angle violation or unsecured top. Subpoena OSHA 10 logs. Negligence boosts settlement value 20-50% without suing employer. Avoid admitting fault.

name: Proving Fault in Farmington Ladder Claims
description: Show improper setup, no training, or missing safety gear via photos, witnesses, maintenance logs. Shifts burden in disputed claims.
